body:
Content
- Adds a new [longrun pipeline](https://buildkite.com/clima/cloudmicrophysics-longruns) 
- Only runs `julia --project=test --color=yes test/aerosol_activation_emulators.jl`
- This pipeline runs on Fridays at 10pm, or it can be manually triggered
- Updated ci.yml to use more julia actions, update existing action versions. `julia-actions/cache@v1` in particular can help CI be a bit more efficient
- Added .jls files to the gitignore

Longrun build [here](https://buildkite.com/clima/cloudmicrophysics-longruns/builds/5)
title: Add longrun pipeline, clean up default pipeline
